title: Nilakkal St.Thomas Church
tagline: Nilakkal St.Thomas Church — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Nilakkal St.Thomas Church is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: Nilakkal St. Thomas Ecumenical Church is an ecumenical Christian church located in Angamoozhy, Kerala, India. It is traditionally regarded as the modern successor to one of the Ezharappallikal (seven and a half churches) believed to have been originally established by St. Thomas in the 1st century AD. The modern structure was completed and consecrated in 1985 as the first ecumenical church of its kind, functioning as a shared place of worship managed by various Episcopal denominations in India.

topPlaces.name: Puthuppally, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: Puthuppally is a town in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. The community is known for its ancient Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church, Puthuppally Palli.

topPlaces.name: Pentecostal Theological Seminary, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: Pentecostal Theological Seminary, Kottayam formerly IPC Theological Seminary, Kottayam (IPCTSK) also known as the Kottayam Theological Seminary, is a Pentecostal theological seminary situated in, Kottayam, Kerala, India. It provides undergraduate and postgraduate theological education in residential, distance and online modes, and operates under the auspices of the IPC Educational & Welfare Society in connection with the Indian Pentecostal Church of God.

topPlaces.name: Payyappaddy
topPlaces.description: Payyappady is a small village in Puthuppally panchayat in Kottayam district of Kerala state, India.

topPlaces.name: Thalappara Kotta
topPlaces.description: Thalappara Kotta (തലപ്പാറ കോട്ട) and Villaliveera are closely related to Sabarimala rituals and ceremonies. According to myths, Manikanda on his journey to Sabarimala was accompanied by Villaliveera, the Thalappara chief.

topPlaces.name: Anchery
topPlaces.description: Anchery is a village that is a part of Puthuppally Panchayat in the Kottayam district of Kerala, South India.

topPlaces.name: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Kottayam or locally known as JNV Vadavathoor is a boarding, co-educational school in Kottayam district of Kerala state in India. Navodaya Vidyalayas are funded by the Indian Ministry of Human Resources Development and administered by Navodaya Vidyalaya Smiti, an autonomous body under the ministry.

topPlaces.name: Kadamuri Narasimhaswamy Temple, Kadamuri
topPlaces.description: Kadamuri Narasimhaswamy Temple is a famous Narasimhaswamy temple in Kerala. It is located at Kadamuri of Kottayam district, in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Meenadam
topPlaces.description: Meenadom is a village in Kottayam, Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nilakkal St.Thomas Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nilakkal St.Thomas Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nilakkal St.Thomas Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (55 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nilakkal St.Thomas Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nilakkal St.Thomas Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nilakkal St.Thomas Church?
faq.a: Stays in Nilakkal St.Thomas Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nilakkal St.Thomas Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Puthuppally, Kottayam, Pentecostal Theological Seminary, Kottayam, Payyappaddy, Thalappara Kotta, Anchery.
